title: stachys nivea
intro: Stachys nivea, also known as White Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys nivea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Stachys nivea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, soothe digestive issues, and support overall well-being.
